title: Zarymok
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Zarymok-UA.jpg|thumb|right|250px|A zarymok]]
'''Zarymoks''' were furry quadruped [[Diet/Legends|herbivores]]. They used specialization techniques in their herds, assigning different jobs to different members, such as [[Scout/Legends|scouting]] or protection.<ref name="UA">''[[Ultimate Adversaries]]''</ref>

{{Creature-stub}}
